calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-16-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael C. Hall, Esq. for Plaintiff: Barbara Frey
No appearance by the Defendant(s): Lynette Knackstedt; Julia Sartain N/A at Sett Conf. Jury demand stricken and N/A by defaulted defendant Carrian Miller.
Plaintiff Barbara Frey, was sworn and direct examined.
Exh. 1 - Three day Notice----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant(s): Lynette Knackstedt; Julia Sartain and Carrian Miller as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2816 21st St., San Francisco.
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of $4,927.60
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs per cost bill.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
Plaintiff's counsel to prepare Judgment.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Off Calendar
